findings.title: Missing Error Handling in Data Pipeline
findings.description: The data processing pipeline lacks comprehensive error handling for malformed input records.
findings.recommendation: Add input validation at pipeline entry point with fallback to dead-letter queue.

findings.title: Tight Coupling Between Auth and User Service
findings.description: Authentication logic is directly coupled to the user service, making it difficult to swap auth providers.
findings.recommendation: Introduce an AuthProvider interface to decouple authentication from user management.

findings.title: No Rate Limiting on Public API
findings.description: The public-facing API has no rate limiting, exposing the system to potential denial-of-service attacks.
findings.recommendation: Implement rate limiting middleware with configurable per-client thresholds.
